name: AnimatedStats
description: A stat/metric row for Framer with count-up number animation, four entrance styles (blur, slide, fade, scale), and 1x4 / 2x2 / 4x1 grid layouts. Numbers animate from 0 to their target value with easeOutExpo when the section scrolls into view.
whenToUse: Use for homepage stat bars, dashboard summaries, or any 'X users, Y% satisfaction' style metric row that should feel alive rather than static text.

props.stats: StatItem[] — { number, suffix, label }, up to 6 items
props.countDuration: number (ms) — duration of the count-up animation
props.staggerDelay: number (ms) — delay between each stat's entrance
props.replayOnReenter: boolean — replay the animation every time it re-enters the viewport
props.demoMode: boolean — shows a live control panel below the component for presentations

designTokens.note: Ships with its own dark/light color pairs (independent of the Frameze site theme system) since it's meant to drop into any project.
